title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils For Knee Swelling
description: Lavandula angustifolia essential oils contains compounds like linalool, linalyl acetate, and camphor, which have anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties that can help with knee swelling. These properties can reduce pain, inflammation, and swelling in the knee joint by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes and blocking the action of pain-causing chemicals.
